creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
I found an old discussion about this problem: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-ports-all/2017-April/150617.html

At that time, osa was still maintainer of the nginx ports. I'm just trying to find out if there's an update to a new version of mod_zip. If you want, here's the patch: http://jochen.joneumbox.org/nginx-zip.diff
